hidden_files.tests/test_hidden_clock_chain.py:
from datetime import datetime

from replay_runner import replay_accepts
from session_policy import in_regular_session


def test_policy_uses_explicit_clock_value():
    assert in_regular_session(datetime(2026, 7, 10, 10, 15)) is True
    assert in_regular_session(datetime(2026, 7, 10, 20, 0)) is False


def test_replay_threads_frame_clock_into_policy():
    assert replay_accepts(datetime(2026, 7, 10, 10, 15)) is True
    assert replay_accepts(datetime(2026, 7, 10, 20, 0)) is False
